title: In your System
description: A horror Mod that takes over
body:
A Simple Horror-Modpack Focused around The [Inside The System](https://modrinth.com/mod/inside-the-system) Mod

One Day you and your *Friend*, CoolPlayer303, decide to start a new World!    
But once your *Friend* joins you notice that he is acting strange, you decide to **** him, over and over..\
and then ￼??�?001￼00~~0�104   ??��0???￼

#
### IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE PLAYING

- It CAN change your desktop wallpaper
- It WILL log your IP Address (hidable using /safeip)
- It CAN create files on your pc
- It CAN open applications
- This isnt a Virus, it's part of the story to enhance immersion
